hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; rel="${f#$PWD/}"; mkdir -p .claude; log=.claude/hook-errors.log; case "$rel" in *.ts|*.html) docker exec round-timer-node eslint --fix "$rel" 2>>"$log"; docker exec round-timer-node prettier --write "$rel" 2>>"$log" ;; *.scss|*.css) docker exec round-timer-node stylelint --fix "$rel" 2>>"$log"; docker exec round-timer-node prettier --write "$rel" 2>>"$log" ;; esac; true
